Write step (string).description: Write a string literal to a workspace path

Write step (heredoc).description: Write a heredoc literal to a workspace path

Assert (single expectation).description: Single-line assertion block with exactly one expectation

Assert (block).description: Multi-line assertion block, one expectation per line

Stdout contains.description: Assert stdout contains the given text

Stdout contents_equals.description: Assert stdout is byte-for-byte equal to a workspace file (use @"..." for a fixture reference)

Stderr contains.description: Assert stderr contains the given text

Stderr contents_equals.description: Assert stderr is byte-for-byte equal to a workspace file (use @"..." for a fixture reference)

File contains.description: Assert a file contains the given text

File contains (heredoc).description: Assert a file contains a heredoc literal's content

File contents_equals.description: Assert a file is byte-for-byte equal to a workspace file (use @"..." for a fixture reference)

File text_equals.description: Assert a file is byte-for-byte equal to inline text

File text_equals (heredoc).description: Assert a file is byte-for-byte equal to a heredoc literal's content

Dir contains.description: Assert a directory contains an entry with the given name

Not block.description: Negate the group result of the child expectations as a whole

All block.description: Pass only when every child expectation passes

Any block.description: Pass when at least one child expectation passes

Fixture reference literal.description: Fixture reference literal (test-definition-side file reference, contents_equals only)
